name: PvP Training Bot - 20-Tech Master Mace Edition
description: Advanced PvP Training Bot Fabric Mod for Minecraft 1.21+, featuring all 20 Mace PvP techniques from beginner to master (with max Breach IV / Breach 4 enforcement, Attribute Swapping, Lunge Swapping, Rocket Macing, D-Taps, and Shield Draining) alongside /bot player skin impersonation.
